accurate.why: All claims are supported by the resolution text; description of the CRA mechanism is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the statement about 'maintaining existing Buy America requirements' is accurate contextual inference.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose: disapproving the FHWA's EV charger Buy America waiver rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly explains the resolution would nullify the FHWA rule.

exceptions_conditions.why: The resolution has no material exceptions or conditions.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the Senate passage date of November 8, 2023.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the single operative provision: disapproval rendering the rule of no force or effect.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies FHWA and the Federal Register citation.

correct_figures.why: 88 Fed. Reg. 10619 and February 21, 2023 are correctly stated.
